entries.title: Single Oracle Without Fallback
entries.summary: Single price feed or data source with no fallback mechanism

indicators: One oracle mentioned with no failure path
No circuit breaker on bad data
design_context.description: The design depends on a single price feed or data source with no fallback mechanism. If the oracle is stale, manipulated, or offline, the protocol operates on bad data.

entries.title: Implicit Trust in External Protocols
entries.summary: Integration with external protocol without documenting trust assumptions

indicators: No failure mode specification for external dependency
No mention of external protocol pause/upgrade/exploit scenarios
design_context.description: The design integrates with an external protocol but doesn't document what it trusts that protocol to do correctly. Assumes the integration just works without specifying failure modes.
